use_cases: Selecting items from a searchable list in forms, settings, and configuration pages
Navigation menus and category browsing in e-commerce interfaces
User role or permission selection in admin dashboards
Filtering and sorting data views in SaaS applications
Multi-select or single-select interfaces in content management systems
ai_summary: A lightweight, accessible list box component built on react-aria-components with native keyboard navigation support. Features sections, collections, and selection states for creating dropdown or inline selection interfaces with standard checkmark indicators for selected items.
